title: taman #2934
definition:
1) to hide, conceal, bury
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to hide
        1a2) hiding, concealing, secretly laying (participle)
        1a3) darkness (participle)
    1b) (Niphal) to hide oneself
    1c) (Hiphil) to hide
